user_query:
I'm filing my postgame package and need your help turning raw inputs into clean deliverables I can hand off to the desk. Use only the files in input/ and produce all outputs in outputs/.

Inputs:
- input/team_quarter_stats.csv — per-quarter team stats for Rivertown Raptors vs. Lakeview Lions.
- input/email_pitch_draft.txt — my rough, wordy email to the editor pitching the story angle.
- input/editor_meeting_transcript.md — transcript from our desk huddle after the game.

Required outputs:
1) outputs/metrics_summary.csv
   - Create a single CSV summarizing totals and advanced metrics for each team. Include one row per team with the exact columns in this order:
     team,total_pts,total_fgm,total_fga,total_3pm,total_3pa,total_ftm,total_fta,oreb,dreb,tov,est_possessions,efg_pct,ts_pct
   - Compute team totals by summing across quarters.
   - Compute advanced metrics using these formulas:
     • est_possessions = total_fga + 0.44*total_fta - oreb + tov
     • efg_pct = (total_fgm + 0.5*total_3pm) / total_fga
     • ts_pct = total_pts / (2*(total_fga + 0.44*total_fta))
   - Round numeric values to 3 decimal places. Do not include pace in this file.

2) outputs/game_recap.md
   - Write a 300–400 word analytical recap with sections:
     • Headline
     • Key Numbers (bullet list): list each team’s eFG%, TS%, and estimated possessions from outputs/metrics_summary.csv, plus game pace defined as (est_possessions_teamA + est_possessions_teamB)/2.
     • Quarter-by-quarter scoring (Q1–Q4 for each team, derived from input/team_quarter_stats.csv PTS per quarter)
     • Methodology (2–3 sentences stating the formulas above and that numbers are aggregated from the per-quarter file)
   - The narrative should focus on how shot profile, turnovers, and late-game execution influenced the result. Do not invent stats; if you cite numbers, they must come from your computations.

3) outputs/pitch_email.txt
   - Rewrite input/email_pitch_draft.txt for a concise, professional tone (≤120 words). Include a clear subject line and 2–3 bullet highlights of the proposed angle. Preserve intent, don’t add new facts.

4) outputs/meeting_notes.md
   - From input/editor_meeting_transcript.md, prepare clean meeting notes with the sections: Decisions, Action items (owner and due date), and Open questions. Use only information in the transcript. Convert any explicit action lines into bullet points with owner and due date.

No internet use is needed. Each deliverable must be complete and consistent with the inputs. The recap’s cited metrics must match outputs/metrics_summary.csv, and the quarter scoring must reconcile with input/team_quarter_stats.csv. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
